title: OpenCost + Aitra Meter — Cost per namespace
description: Side-by-side: GPU-hour cost (OpenCost) vs token cost (Aitra Meter) per namespace. The gap between these two views surfaces serving efficiency differences that neither tool sees alone.

panels.title: GPU-hour cost per namespace (OpenCost)
panels.description: Source: OpenCost. Cost per namespace based on GPU-hour allocation.

panels.title: Token cost per namespace — $/M tokens (Aitra Meter)
panels.description: Source: Aitra Meter. Cost per namespace based on output token volume.
